name: layout-starter
title: Layout Starter
description: @interlace/ui — the six layout primitives that compose every page. One install, the LAYOUT_PHILOSOPHY contract is satisfied.

files.content:
# @interlace/layout-starter

Installed:

- `Container` — 4 width tiers (prose / content / wide / full).
- `Section` — vertical-rhythm slabs.
- `Stack` + `Cluster` — six-step gap scale.
- `Grid` — responsive grid primitive.
- `Box` — token-aware surface (background + padding + radius + border).
- `Typography` — h1..h6, body, long, ui, ui-sm, caption, code variants.
- `theme` — full DS CSS baseline.

Docs: https://ds.interlace.tools/getting-started
